name: account-list
purpose: Selectable list of accounts — identicon + label + balance rows with hover caret — used as the account chooser in Hub flows (inside AccountSelector).

props.name: accounts
props.description: Accounts to list: { userFriendlyAddress, label, balance (luna), walletId?, defaultLabel? }.

props.name: disabledAddresses
props.description: Addresses rendered disabled with an explanatory tooltip.

props.name: walletId
props.description: Fallback wallet id emitted with account-selected when the account has none.

props.name: editable
props.description: Render labels as LabelInput fields instead of selectable rows.

props.name: decimals
props.description: Exact decimals for the balance Amount (else min 2 / max 5).

props.name: minBalance
props.description: Balances render only when set; accounts below it are disabled (insufficient balance).

props.name: disableContracts
props.description: Disable contract entries (no path) with a tooltip.

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props forwarded to the disabled-row Tooltip.

notes: Sample state: 3 enabled rows (Main Account 12 345.6789 NIM / Savings 2500.00 NIM / Pocket Money 49.92 NIM), minBalance set so balances render, list at 420px (SmallPage width). Addresses are synthetic but checksum-valid (IBAN mod-97). Identicons via @nimiq/iqons@1.6.0 pinned on jsdelivr with Iqons.svgPath pointed at iqons.min.svg (same recipe as the identicon component). Static state: identicon scale(0.9), label/balance opacity 0.7, caret hidden (appears on hover with green balance + row highlight). Amount formatting: U+202F narrow no-break space grouping above 4 integer digits. The row content is upstream's Account.vue (layout 'row'); its markup/styles are inlined in the Vue port since Account has no own registry entry. Tooltip/LabelInput only appear for disabled/editable rows (not in sample).
